title: Training Composer 2
summary: Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 base model (1T parameters, 32B active, 256K context) and trained using coding-focused pre-training followed by long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install exploration. The system uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to optimize for multi-step code generation tasks.
